Package com.cloudera.cdp.dfworkload.model

Class ParameterGroup

java.lang.Object
com.cloudera.cdp.dfworkload.model.ParameterGroup
@Generated(value="com.cloudera.cdp.client.codegen.CdpSDKJavaCodegen", date="2026-06-24T07:36:56.373Z") public class ParameterGroup extends Object
A parameter group represents a collection of parameters that can be used across multiple workloads.
